name: Employee IP Assignment
text: All intellectual property created by the Employee in the course of employment shall vest with the Employer, subject to applicable law.

legal_basis.note: Employer owns copyright in employment works
Patent assignment — must be in writing
Employee invention — employer's right to apply

invalid_if: IP assignment exceeds scope of employment
title: Intellectual Property Assignment
dispute_hotspots: Employee claims invention made outside work hours — boundary between personal and employment IP
Pre-existing IP — employee brought IP into employment, employer claims it
